test_cases.title: Dynamic retention window gradient lookup
test_cases.description: Verify getRetentionWindow(usagePercent) returns correct count per gradient tier
steps: Create SegmentTracker with 12 completed mock segments

test_cases.title: Retention window with no completed segments
test_cases.description: Verify empty case returns empty array

test_cases.title: Compression scope — within ratio range
test_cases.description: Verify computeCompressionScope accumulates segments until ratio is 20-50%
steps: Create 10 mock segments with known digest sizes, retention=2
Verify at least 1 segment is included

test_cases.title: Compression scope — all segments too small
test_cases.description: Verify when all segments < 20%, all are included
steps: Create 3 mock segments with very small digest sizes

test_cases.title: Compression scope — first segment exceeds max
test_cases.description: Verify when even 1 segment exceeds 50%, it's still included
steps: Create scenario where 1 segment exceeds 50% ratio
Verify 1 segment is returned (compress it anyway)

test_cases.title: Tree append structure after multiple compressions
test_cases.description: Verify trees are appended, old groups unchanged
steps: Run compression on segments 0-5 → tree has groups A, B
Store group summaries for A, B
Run compression on segments 6-10 → tree has A, B, C, D
Verify C and D have correct segIds

test_cases.title: Compression prompt includes existing groups
test_cases.description: Verify buildCompressionPrompt includes <existing-groups> section when tree exists
steps: Verify output contains old group nodeId values
Verify instruction says DO NOT modify old groups

test_cases.title: Initial compression prompt (no tree)
steps: Verify output contains CONTEXT CHECKPOINT header
Verify output has tool call guard

test_cases.title: Context injection contains all tree nodes
test_cases.description: Verify assembled messages include all tree node summaries
steps: Create ContextAssembler with compressed tree having 3 groups, 10 leaves
Call assembleMessages with empty messages array
Verify output contains 1 ic-summary per group + 1 per leaf = 13 total
Verify no raw segment content in output

test_cases.title: Compression trigger flow — usage < 50% skips
test_cases.description: Verify compression doesn't fire at low usage
steps: Verify isCompressing() is false, no entry written

test_cases.title: Compression trigger flow — usage >= 50% fires
test_cases.description: Verify compression fires when usage exceeds threshold

test_cases.title: Compression failure fallback sequence
test_cases.description: Verify handleCompressionFailure retries then falls back
steps: Trigger compression that will fail (mock child process exit code 1)
On second failure verify ruleBasedFallback is called
Verify tree exists with all segments as leaf nodes

test_cases.title: Rule-based fallback segment summary length
test_cases.description: Verify fallback summaries meet minimum length
steps: Create a segment with short userMessage

test_cases.title: End-to-end session verification
test_cases.description: Full Pi session with 30+ messages, verify compression works end-to-end
steps: Send 25+ short messages to fill context
Verify compact tree entry appears in session
Verify old content accessible via recall tool
Verify new messages appear in context normally
